options.content:
## Developer Scorecard

This dashboard ranks contributors separately per tool since GitHub and Jira use different identities with no common link.

### GitHub Leaderboard
Scores developers on code contributions and code review activity from GitHub.
- **Columns**: Commits, Lines Changed, PRs Merged, PRs Reviewed, Avg Cycle Time, Avg Review Time, Avg Pickup Time, Avg Review Depth, Avg PR Size (LOC), PRs w/o Review
- **GitHub Score**: `Commits×1 + Lines÷100 + PRs Merged×3 + PRs Reviewed×2 + Avg Review Depth×1`

### Jira Leaderboard
Scores developers on issue delivery from Jira.
- **Columns**: Total Assigned, Issues Resolved, Issues Open, Avg Resolution (days)

### Relative Contribution Chart
Normalizes each GitHub dimension to 0–100 relative to the top contributor, making cross-developer comparison easy.

> Fuzzy identity matching (SOUNDEX + 80% length ratio) merges slightly different display names of the same person (e.g. typos, GitHub handles vs real names).

targets.rawSql:
WITH commit_stats AS (
  SELECT c.author_name AS developer,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.sha)          AS commits,
    SUM(c.additions + c.deletions) AS lines_changed
  FROM commits c
  JOIN repo_commits rc ON rc.commit_sha = c.sha
  WHERE rc.repo_id IN (${repo_id})
    AND $__timeFilter(c.authored_date)
    AND c.author_name != ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
pr_stats AS (
  SELECT pr.author_name AS developer,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pr.status = 'MERGED' THEN pr.id END) AS prs_merged
  FROM pull_requests pr
  WHERE pr.base_repo_id IN (${repo_id})
    AND $__timeFilter(pr.merged_date)
    AND pr.author_name != ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
review_stats AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(prr.user_name,''), NULLIF(prr.name,'')) AS developer,
    COUNT(DISTINCT prr.pull_request_id) AS prs_reviewed
  FROM pull_request_reviewers prr
  JOIN pull_requests pr ON pr.id = prr.pull_request_id
  WHERE pr.base_repo_id IN (${repo_id})
    AND $__timeFilter(pr.created_date)
  GROUP BY 1
),
pr_metrics AS (
  SELECT pr.author_name AS developer,
    ROUND(AVG(prm.pr_cycle_time  / 1440.0), 1) AS avg_cycle_time_days,
    ROUND(AVG(prm.pr_review_time / 1440.0), 1) AS avg_review_time_days,
    ROUND(AVG(prm.pr_pickup_time / 1440.0), 1) AS avg_pickup_time_days
  FROM pull_requests pr
  JOIN project_pr_metrics prm ON pr.id = prm.id
  WHERE pr.base_repo_id IN (${repo_id})
    AND $__timeFilter(pr.merged_date)
    AND pr.status = 'MERGED'
    AND pr.author_name != ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
review_depth AS (
  SELECT pr.author_name AS developer,
    ROUND(AVG(cc.cnt), 1) AS avg_review_depth
  FROM pull_requests pr
  JOIN (
    SELECT pull_request_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM pull_request_comments
    GROUP BY pull_request_id
  ) cc ON cc.pull_request_id = pr.id
  WHERE pr.base_repo_id IN (${repo_id})
    AND $__timeFilter(pr.merged_date)
    AND pr.status = 'MERGED'
    AND pr.author_name != ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
pr_size AS (
  SELECT pr.author_name AS developer,
    ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(c.additions, 0) + COALESCE(c.deletions, 0))) AS avg_pr_size_loc
  FROM pull_requests pr
  LEFT JOIN commits c ON pr.merge_commit_sha = c.sha
  WHERE pr.base_repo_id IN (${repo_id})
    AND $__timeFilter(pr.merged_date)
    AND pr.status = 'MERGED'
    AND pr.author_name != ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
no_review AS (
  SELECT pr.author_name AS developer,
    SUM(CASE WHEN pr.id NOT IN (
      SELECT DISTINCT pull_request_id FROM pull_request_comments
    ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS prs_without_review
  FROM pull_requests pr
  WHERE pr.base_repo_id IN (${repo_id})
    AND $__timeFilter(pr.merged_date)
    AND pr.status = 'MERGED'
    AND pr.author_name != ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
all_devs AS (
  SELECT developer FROM commit_stats WHERE developer IS NOT NULL
  UNION SELECT developer FROM pr_stats      WHERE developer IS NOT NULL
  UNION SELECT developer FROM review_stats  WHERE developer IS NOT NULL
),
normed AS (
  SELECT developer, REGEXP_REPLACE(LOWER(developer), '[^a-z]', '') AS norm
  FROM all_devs WHERE developer IS NOT NULL AND developer != ''
),
canonical AS (
  SELECT
    a.developer,
    (SELECT b.developer FROM normed b
     WHERE SOUNDEX(a.norm) = SOUNDEX(b.norm)
       AND LEAST(LENGTH(a.norm), LENGTH(b.norm)) * 10 >= GREATEST(LENGTH(a.norm), LENGTH(b.norm)) * 8
     ORDER BY LENGTH(b.norm) DESC, b.developer ASC LIMIT 1
    ) AS canonical_name
  FROM normed a
)
SELECT
  c.canonical_name                               AS Developer,
  COALESCE(SUM(cs.commits),       0)             AS Commits,
  COALESCE(SUM(cs.lines_changed), 0)             AS `Lines Changed`,
  COALESCE(SUM(ps.prs_merged),    0)             AS `PRs Merged`,
  COALESCE(SUM(rs.prs_reviewed),  0)             AS `PRs Reviewed`,
  ROUND(AVG(pm.avg_cycle_time_days),  1)         AS `Avg Cycle Time (d)`,
  ROUND(AVG(pm.avg_review_time_days), 1)         AS `Avg Review Time (d)`,
  ROUND(AVG(pm.avg_pickup_time_days), 1)         AS `Avg Pickup Time (d)`,
  ROUND(AVG(rd.avg_review_depth),     1)         AS `Avg Review Depth`,
  ROUND(AVG(pz.avg_pr_size_loc))                 AS `Avg PR Size (LOC)`,
  COALESCE(SUM(nr.prs_without_review), 0)        AS `PRs w/o Review`,
  COALESCE(SUM(cs.commits), 0) * 1
    + FLOOR(COALESCE(SUM(cs.lines_changed), 0) / 100)
    + COALESCE(SUM(ps.prs_merged),   0) * 3
    + COALESCE(SUM(rs.prs_reviewed), 0) * 2
    + ROUND(COALESCE(AVG(rd.avg_review_depth), 0)) * 1  AS `GitHub Score`
FROM canonical c
LEFT JOIN commit_stats cs ON cs.developer = c.developer
LEFT JOIN pr_stats     ps ON ps.developer = c.developer
LEFT JOIN review_stats rs ON rs.developer = c.developer
LEFT JOIN pr_metrics   pm ON pm.developer = c.developer
LEFT JOIN review_depth rd ON rd.developer = c.developer
LEFT JOIN pr_size      pz ON pz.developer = c.developer
LEFT JOIN no_review    nr ON nr.developer = c.developer
GROUP BY c.canonical_name
ORDER BY `GitHub Score` DESC
LIMIT 30

panels.title: GitHub Developer Leaderboard [Activity in Selected Time Range]

targets.rawSql:
WITH issue_stats AS (
  SELECT i.assignee_name AS developer,
    COUNT(DISTINCT i.id)                                                          AS total_assigned,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN i.status = 'DONE' THEN i.id END)                    AS issues_resolved,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN i.status != 'DONE' THEN i.id END)                   AS issues_open,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE
      WHEN i.status = 'DONE'
        AND i.resolution_date IS NOT NULL
        AND i.created_date IS NOT NULL
      THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, i.created_date, i.resolution_date)
    END), 1) AS avg_resolution_days
  FROM issues i
  JOIN board_issues bi ON bi.issue_id = i.id
  WHERE bi.board_id IN (${board_id})
    AND $__timeFilter(i.created_date)
    AND i.assignee_name != ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
all_devs AS (
  SELECT developer FROM issue_stats WHERE developer IS NOT NULL AND developer != ''
),
normed AS (
  SELECT developer, REGEXP_REPLACE(LOWER(developer), '[^a-z]', '') AS norm
  FROM all_devs
),
canonical AS (
  SELECT
    a.developer,
    (SELECT b.developer FROM normed b
     WHERE SOUNDEX(a.norm) = SOUNDEX(b.norm)
       AND LEAST(LENGTH(a.norm), LENGTH(b.norm)) * 10 >= GREATEST(LENGTH(a.norm), LENGTH(b.norm)) * 8
     ORDER BY LENGTH(b.norm) DESC, b.developer ASC LIMIT 1
    ) AS canonical_name
  FROM normed a
)
SELECT
  c.canonical_name                                AS Developer,
  COALESCE(SUM(s.total_assigned),   0)           AS `Total Assigned`,
  COALESCE(SUM(s.issues_resolved),  0)           AS `Issues Resolved`,
  COALESCE(SUM(s.issues_open),      0)           AS `Issues Open`,
  ROUND(AVG(s.avg_resolution_days), 1)           AS `Avg Resolution (d)`
FROM canonical c
LEFT JOIN issue_stats s ON s.developer = c.developer
GROUP BY c.canonical_name
ORDER BY `Issues Resolved` DESC
LIMIT 30

panels.title: Jira Developer Leaderboard [Activity in Selected Time Range]

targets.rawSql:
WITH commit_stats AS (
  SELECT c.author_name AS developer,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.sha) AS commits,
    SUM(c.additions + c.deletions) AS lines_changed
  FROM commits c
  JOIN repo_commits rc ON rc.commit_sha = c.sha
  WHERE rc.repo_id IN (${repo_id})
    AND $__timeFilter(c.authored_date) AND c.author_name != ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
pr_stats AS (
  SELECT pr.author_name AS developer,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pr.status = 'MERGED' THEN pr.id END) AS prs_merged
  FROM pull_requests pr
  WHERE pr.base_repo_id IN (${repo_id})
    AND $__timeFilter(pr.merged_date) AND pr.author_name != ''
  GROUP BY 1
),
review_stats AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(prr.user_name,''), NULLIF(prr.name,'')) AS developer,
    COUNT(DISTINCT prr.pull_request_id) AS prs_reviewed
  FROM pull_request_reviewers prr
  JOIN pull_requests pr ON pr.id = prr.pull_request_id
  WHERE pr.base_repo_id IN (${repo_id})
    AND $__timeFilter(pr.created_date)
  GROUP BY 1
),
all_devs AS (
  SELECT developer FROM commit_stats WHERE developer IS NOT NULL
  UNION SELECT developer FROM pr_stats      WHERE developer IS NOT NULL
  UNION SELECT developer FROM review_stats  WHERE developer IS NOT NULL
),
normed AS (
  SELECT developer, REGEXP_REPLACE(LOWER(developer), '[^a-z]', '') AS norm
  FROM all_devs WHERE developer IS NOT NULL AND developer != ''
),
canonical AS (
  SELECT
    a.developer,
    (SELECT b.developer FROM normed b
     WHERE SOUNDEX(a.norm) = SOUNDEX(b.norm)
       AND LEAST(LENGTH(a.norm), LENGTH(b.norm)) * 10 >= GREATEST(LENGTH(a.norm), LENGTH(b.norm)) * 8
     ORDER BY LENGTH(b.norm) DESC, b.developer ASC LIMIT 1
    ) AS canonical_name
  FROM normed a
),
combined AS (
  SELECT
    c.canonical_name                         AS developer,
    COALESCE(SUM(cs.commits),       0)       AS commits,
    COALESCE(SUM(cs.lines_changed), 0)       AS lines_changed,
    COALESCE(SUM(ps.prs_merged),    0)       AS prs_merged,
    COALESCE(SUM(rs.prs_reviewed),  0)       AS prs_reviewed
  FROM canonical c
  LEFT JOIN commit_stats cs ON cs.developer = c.developer
  LEFT JOIN pr_stats     ps ON ps.developer = c.developer
  LEFT JOIN review_stats rs ON rs.developer = c.developer
  GROUP BY c.canonical_name
),
maxvals AS (
  SELECT NULLIF(MAX(commits),0) mx_c, NULLIF(MAX(lines_changed),0) mx_l,
    NULLIF(MAX(prs_merged),0) mx_p, NULLIF(MAX(prs_reviewed),0) mx_r
  FROM combined
)
SELECT c.developer AS Developer,
  ROUND(100 * c.commits       / m.mx_c) AS `Commits (norm)`,
  ROUND(100 * c.lines_changed / m.mx_l) AS `Lines (norm)`,
  ROUND(100 * c.prs_merged    / m.mx_p) AS `PRs Merged (norm)`,
  ROUND(100 * c.prs_reviewed  / m.mx_r) AS `Reviews (norm)`
FROM combined c, maxvals m
ORDER BY (
  COALESCE(c.commits/m.mx_c,0) + COALESCE(c.lines_changed/m.mx_l,0)
  + COALESCE(c.prs_merged/m.mx_p,0) + COALESCE(c.prs_reviewed/m.mx_r,0)
) DESC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: GitHub Relative Contribution per Dimension [Activity in Selected Time Range]

list.definition: SELECT project_name FROM user_project_mapping WHERE user_login = '${__user.login}'
list.label: Project
list.name: project
list.query: SELECT project_name FROM user_project_mapping WHERE user_login = '${__user.login}'

list.definition: SELECT concat(r.name, '--', r.id) as text FROM repos r JOIN project_mapping pm ON pm.row_id = r.id AND pm.table = 'repos' WHERE r.id LIKE 'github%' AND pm.project_name IN (${project})
list.label: GitHub Repo
list.name: repo_id
list.query: SELECT concat(r.name, '--', r.id) as text FROM repos r JOIN project_mapping pm ON pm.row_id = r.id AND pm.table = 'repos' WHERE r.id LIKE 'github%' AND pm.project_name IN (${project})

list.definition: SELECT concat(b.name, '--', b.id) FROM boards b JOIN project_mapping pm ON pm.row_id = b.id AND pm.table = 'boards' WHERE b.id LIKE 'jira%' AND pm.project_name IN (${project})
list.label: Jira Board
list.name: board_id
list.query: SELECT concat(b.name, '--', b.id) FROM boards b JOIN project_mapping pm ON pm.row_id = b.id AND pm.table = 'boards' WHERE b.id LIKE 'jira%' AND pm.project_name IN (${project})
